title: HMS Dragon docks in eastern Mediterranean after problems with water systems
description: Royal Navy type 45 destroyer deployed to reinforce security around RAF base in Cyprus to undergo short maintenance stop, says MoD
content:
HMS Dragon has docked in the eastern Mediterranean after suffering technical problems with its water systems.

title: Tributes after British teenager dies while visiting Vietnam
description: Orla Wates, reportedly killed in a road accident, is remembered by her mother as "beautiful, independent and very funny".
content:
A young British woman has died while visiting Vietnam, reportedly in a road accident.
Local media report that Orla Wates, 19, was travelling the Ha Giang Loop in northern Vietnam when she fell from the back of a motorcycle.
According to Viet Nam News... [1721 chars]

title: Oil slides after US-Iran ceasefire deal to open Strait of Hormuz
description: The agreement was announced not long before Trump's Tuesday evening deadline was reached.
content:
Global oil prices have fallen sharply and stock markets have jumped after the US and Iran agreed a conditional two-week ceasefire deal that includes the reopening of the key Strait of Hormuz waterway.
The price of benchmark Brent crude fell by about ... [1214 chars]

title: US and Iran agree to provisional ceasefire with Tehran saying it will reopen strait of Hormuz
description: Last-minute intervention led by Pakistan cancels Trump ultimatum for Iran to surrender or face annihilation
content:
The US and Iran agreed to a two-week conditional ceasefire on Tuesday evening after a last-minute diplomatic intervention led by Pakistan, canceling an ultimatum from Donald Trump for Iran to surrender or face widespread destruction.

title: Southampton leapfrog Wrexham after thrashing to climb into playoff spots
description: Southampton continued their Championship charge as they thrashed Wrexham 5-1 to replace the Welsh side in the playoff places
content:
Southampton continued their Championship charge as they thrashed Wrexham 5-1 to replace the Welsh side in the playoff places.
